entries.title: IdP permission management, typed executor event configs, and AuthConnection status
entries.body:
New IdP permission management in tailorctl and terraform-provider-tailor for configuring identity provider access rules

Executor triggers now accept typed event configs, enabling strongly-typed event-driven workflows

AuthConnection objects expose a status field for monitoring SSO configuration health

Pipeline UpdateNamespace correctly persists zero-value fields, allowing fields to be cleared via SDL updates
entries.bodyHtml:
• New IdP permission management in tailorctl and terraform-provider-tailor for configuring identity provider access rules
  • Executor triggers now accept typed event configs, enabling strongly-typed event-driven workflows
  • AuthConnection objects expose a status field for monitoring SSO configuration health
  • Pipeline UpdateNamespace correctly persists zero-value fields, allowing fields to be cleared via SDL updates

narrative.summary: tailorctl and Terraform provider now support IdP permissions; executor triggers support typed event configurations
narrative.impact: Configure identity provider permissions via CLI and Terraform IaC; executor triggers can process strongly-typed event payloads
details: New IdP permission management in both tailorctl and terraform-provider-tailor for configuring identity provider access rules
Executor triggers now accept typed event configs, enabling strongly-typed event-driven workflows
AuthConnection objects expose a status field for monitoring SSO configuration health
Pipeline UpdateNamespace correctly persists zero-value fields, allowing fields to be cleared via SDL updates

entries.title: Default workspace routing subset renamed to 'shared01'
entries.body:
Default subset renamed from 'default' to 'shared01' in workspace routing configuration

Automatic database migration renames existing 'default' subset entries to 'shared01'

Tailor-Subset header is now propagated across all internal service-to-service calls for consistent subset isolation
entries.bodyHtml:
• Default subset renamed from 'default' to 'shared01' in workspace routing configuration
  • Automatic database migration renames existing 'default' subset entries to 'shared01'
  • Tailor-Subset header is now propagated across all internal service-to-service calls for consistent subset isolation

narrative.summary: Default workspace routing subset renamed from 'default' to 'shared01'
narrative.impact: Workspace routing now uses 'shared01' as the default subset; the Tailor-Subset header is propagated across all internal service calls
details: Default subset renamed from 'default' to 'shared01' in workspace routing configuration
Automatic database migration renames existing 'default' subset entries to 'shared01'
Tailor-Subset header is now propagated across all internal service-to-service calls for consistent subset isolation

entries.title: Critical fix for V8 GC crash and increased Envoy sidecar resources
entries.body:
Fixed use-after-free bug in V8 GC epilogue callback that caused intermittent function runtime crashes

Increased CPU and memory resources for critically under-provisioned Envoy sidecar containers

Function execution stability improved under concurrent workloads
entries.bodyHtml:
• Fixed use-after-free bug in V8 GC epilogue callback that caused intermittent function runtime crashes
  • Increased CPU and memory resources for critically under-provisioned Envoy sidecar containers
  • Function execution stability improved under concurrent workloads

narrative.summary: Critical fix for V8 garbage collector crash and increased Envoy sidecar resources
narrative.impact: JavaScript functions are significantly more stable with reduced risk of intermittent crashes under load
details: Fixed use-after-free bug in V8 GC epilogue callback that caused intermittent function runtime crashes
Increased CPU and memory resources for critically under-provisioned Envoy sidecar containers
Function execution stability improved under concurrent workloads

entries.title: Dynamic breadcrumb overrides, Combobox.Async initial items, and portal z-index fix
entries.body:
Breaking: AsyncFetcherFn query parameter is now string | null — handle null to return initial items when the dropdown opens

New useOverrideBreadcrumb hook lets page components display data-driven titles in breadcrumbs

Fix guards in appShellPageProps now correctly apply in file-based routing

Fix portal components (Menu, Select, Combobox, Autocomplete, Tooltip) rendering behind the sidebar
entries.bodyHtml:
• Breaking: AsyncFetcherFn query parameter is now string | null — handle null to return initial items when the dropdown opens
  • New useOverrideBreadcrumb hook lets page components display data-driven titles in breadcrumbs
  • Fix: guards in appShellPageProps now correctly apply in file-based routing
  • Fix: portal components (Menu, Select, Combobox, Autocomplete, Tooltip) rendering behind the sidebar

narrative.summary: AsyncFetcherFn now receives null on first open; useOverrideBreadcrumb hook for dynamic breadcrumb titles
narrative.impact: Async comboboxes can show initial items on open; page components can set data-driven breadcrumb titles; portal components no longer render behind the sidebar
details: BREAKING: AsyncFetcherFn query parameter is now string | null — return initial/default items when query is null (dropdown just opened or cleared)
useAsync calls fetcher(null) automatically on first open so Combobox.Async shows items immediately without requiring user input
New useOverrideBreadcrumb hook lets page components display data-driven titles (e.g. record names from API queries) in breadcrumbs
Guards defined via appShellPageProps now correctly apply in file-based routing
Portal-based components (Menu, Select, Combobox, Autocomplete, Tooltip) fixed to render above the sidebar using CSS custom property z-index values
narrative.migration: Update AsyncFetcherFn to handle query: string | null. When query is null the dropdown was just opened or cleared — return initial/default items, or return an empty array to wait for user input before showing results.

entries.title: Auth connection support for managing OAuth2 connections with external providers
entries.body:
New auth connection API for creating and managing OAuth2 connections with external identity providers

Deploy logic now delegates to the shared tailor-platform/actions/deploy composite action, eliminating locally generated deploy scripts
entries.bodyHtml:
• New auth connection API for creating and managing OAuth2 connections with external identity providers
  • Deploy logic now delegates to the shared tailor-platform/actions/deploy composite action, eliminating locally generated deploy scripts

narrative.summary: Auth connection support for managing OAuth2 connections with external providers
narrative.impact: Programmatically create and manage OAuth2 connections; deploy workflows use a centralized action reducing per-project boilerplate
details: New auth connection API for creating and managing OAuth2 connections with external identity providers
Deploy logic now delegates to the shared tailor-platform/actions/deploy composite action, eliminating locally generated deploy scripts

entries.title: Fix SQL query command rewriting user input
entries.body: Fixed SQL query command rewriting user-provided SQL, which broke INSERT/UPDATE statements and PascalCase table names
entries.bodyHtml: • Fixed SQL query command rewriting user-provided SQL, which broke INSERT/UPDATE statements and PascalCase table names

narrative.summary: SQL query command no longer rewrites user-provided SQL input
narrative.impact: INSERT/UPDATE statements and PascalCase table names now execute correctly without being silently modified
details: Fixed a bug where the SQL query command was rewriting user-provided SQL, breaking INSERT/UPDATE statements
PascalCase table names are now preserved as-is instead of being lowercased or transformed

entries.title: Fix Kysely type generation for date/datetime fields in nested objects
entries.body:
Fixed Kysely type generation for date/datetime fields inside nested objects (db.object())

Added ObjectColumnType<T> helper for correct Insertable/Selectable type expansion

Nullable fields inside nested objects are now optional for inserts and required for selects
entries.bodyHtml:
• Fixed Kysely type generation for date/datetime fields inside nested objects (db.object())
  • Added ObjectColumnType<T> helper for correct Insertable/Selectable type expansion
  • Nullable fields inside nested objects are now optional for inserts and required for selects

narrative.summary: Kysely type generation correctly handles date/datetime fields inside nested objects
narrative.impact: TypeScript types for nested objects with date fields now correctly allow Date | string on insert and return Date on select
details: Added ObjectColumnType<T> helper that wraps nested objects in ColumnType for correct Kysely Insertable/Selectable type expansion
Nested objects containing date/datetime fields now accept Date | string on insert and return Date on select
Nullable fields inside nested objects are now optional for inserts and required for selects, matching Kysely conventions

entries.title: ActivityCard, Form/Field/Fieldset, Card, MetricCard, and Avatar components
entries.body:
New ActivityCard component for rendering timestamped activity timelines with standalone and compound APIs

New Form, Fieldset, and Field components with HTML constraint validation and React Hook Form + Zod integration

New Card compound component for consistent container layouts

New MetricCard for KPI dashboards, Avatar component with size variants, and Button xs size variant
entries.bodyHtml:
• New ActivityCard component for rendering timestamped activity timelines with standalone and compound APIs
  • New Form, Fieldset, and Field components with HTML constraint validation and React Hook Form + Zod integration
  • New Card compound component for consistent container layouts
  • New MetricCard for KPI dashboards, Avatar component with size variants, and Button xs size variant

narrative.summary: Six new UI components: ActivityCard, Form/Field/Fieldset, Card, MetricCard, and Avatar
narrative.impact: Build audit timelines, validated forms, KPI dashboards, and consistent card layouts without third-party dependencies
details: ActivityCard with standalone (<ActivityCard items={...} />) and compound (ActivityCard.Root/.Items/.Item) APIs for timestamped activity feeds with grouping and custom rendering
Form, Fieldset, and Field components with HTML constraint validation, React Hook Form + Zod integration, and automatic aria wiring
Card compound component (Card.Root, Card.Header, Card.Content) as a general-purpose container with consistent styling
MetricCard for KPI dashboard summaries with title, value, trend direction indicator, and description
Avatar component (Avatar.Root, Avatar.Image, Avatar.Fallback) with sm/default/lg size variants
Button xs size variant for compact inline actions in cards and tight layouts

entries.title: Multi-event executor triggers and improved deployment planning
entries.body:
Single executors can now handle multiple event types (create/update/delete) using the new `events` array parameter

Deployment plans now show which resources are unchanged, making it clearer what will actually change

Bidirectional foreign keys between IDP users and userProfile types ensure seed data validation catches mismatches in both directions

JSDoc documentation added to public APIs for better IDE autocomplete and inline help
entries.bodyHtml:
• Single executors can now handle multiple event types (create/update/delete) using the new `events` array parameter
  • Deployment plans now show which resources are unchanged, making it clearer what will actually change
  • Bidirectional foreign keys between IDP users and userProfile types ensure seed data validation catches mismatches in both directions
  • JSDoc documentation added to public APIs for better IDE autocomplete and inline help

narrative.summary: Multi-event executor triggers and improved deployment planning
narrative.impact: Simpler event handling and better visibility into infrastructure changes
details: Single executors can now handle multiple event types (create/update/delete) using the new `events` array parameter
Deployment plans now show which resources are unchanged, making it clearer what will actually change
Bidirectional foreign keys between IDP users and userProfile types ensure seed data validation catches mismatches in both directions
JSDoc documentation added to public APIs for better IDE autocomplete and inline help

entries.title: Resolver validation errors now include field-level paths
entries.body:
Resolver input validation now uses TailorErrors instead of generic Error objects

Platform runtime expands validation issues into individual GraphQL errors with full field paths

Each invalid field gets its own error entry with the exact path to the problem

Works seamlessly with the existing GraphQL error format your clients already handle
entries.bodyHtml:
• Resolver input validation now uses TailorErrors instead of generic Error objects
  • Platform runtime expands validation issues into individual GraphQL errors with full field paths
  • Each invalid field gets its own error entry with the exact path to the problem
  • Works seamlessly with the existing GraphQL error format your clients already handle

narrative.summary: Resolver validation errors now include field-level paths
narrative.impact: API consumers get precise error messages pointing to exactly which field failed validation
details: Resolver input validation now uses TailorErrors instead of generic Error objects
Platform runtime expands validation issues into individual GraphQL errors with full field paths
Each invalid field gets its own error entry with the exact path to the problem
Works seamlessly with the existing GraphQL error format your clients already handle

entries.title: Bun runtime support and secure OS keyring token storage
entries.body:
CLI now works natively with Bun and Deno runtimes without requiring tsx transpilation

Set TAILOR_USE_KEYRING=1 to store tokens in OS-native secure storage (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Linux Secret Service)

Dynamic import for connect-node transport enables Bun runtime compatibility

Expanded CI test matrix validates CLI across multiple OS, Node versions, package managers, and runtimes
entries.bodyHtml:
• CLI now works natively with Bun and Deno runtimes without requiring tsx transpilation
  • Set TAILOR_USE_KEYRING=1 to store tokens in OS-native secure storage (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Linux Secret Service)
  • Dynamic import for connect-node transport enables Bun runtime compatibility
  • Expanded CI test matrix validates CLI across multiple OS, Node versions, package managers, and runtimes

narrative.summary: Bun runtime support and secure OS keyring token storage
narrative.impact: Faster CLI execution with Bun and optional secure credential storage for enterprise users
details: CLI now works natively with Bun and Deno runtimes without requiring tsx transpilation
Set TAILOR_USE_KEYRING=1 to store tokens in OS-native secure storage (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Linux Secret Service)
Dynamic import for connect-node transport enables Bun runtime compatibility
Expanded CI test matrix validates CLI across multiple OS, Node versions, package managers, and runtimes
narrative.migration: Token storage remains file-based by default for backward compatibility. To enable OS keyring storage, set the TAILOR_USE_KEYRING=1 environment variable.

entries.title: Organization and folder management commands
entries.body:
New CLI commands: organization list/get/update/tree for managing organizations

New CLI commands: organization folder list/get/create/update/delete for folder operations

Programmatic API exports available for building custom tooling

Read-only arrays can now be passed directly to db.enum() and t.enum() without spread workarounds
entries.bodyHtml:
• New CLI commands: organization list/get/update/tree for managing organizations
  • New CLI commands: organization folder list/get/create/update/delete for folder operations
  • Programmatic API exports available for building custom tooling
  • Read-only arrays can now be passed directly to db.enum() and t.enum() without spread workarounds

narrative.impact: Programmatic access to organization hierarchy and folder structure
details: New CLI commands: organization list/get/update/tree for managing organizations
New CLI commands: organization folder list/get/create/update/delete for folder operations
Programmatic API exports available for building custom tooling
Read-only arrays can now be passed directly to db.enum() and t.enum() without spread workarounds

entries.title: Machine user authentication for CI/CD pipelines
entries.body:
New login --machineuser flag authenticates with client ID and secret for non-interactive environments

Supports --client-id and --client-secret options or TAILOR_PLATFORM_MACHINE_USER_CLIENT_ID/CLIENT_SECRET environment variables

Client secret is prompted securely when omitted, preventing credential leaks in shell history

Token is stored in platform config for automatic use by subsequent SDK commands
entries.bodyHtml:
• New login --machineuser flag authenticates with client ID and secret for non-interactive environments
  • Supports --client-id and --client-secret options or TAILOR_PLATFORM_MACHINE_USER_CLIENT_ID/CLIENT_SECRET environment variables
  • Client secret is prompted securely when omitted, preventing credential leaks in shell history
  • Token is stored in platform config for automatic use by subsequent SDK commands

narrative.summary: Machine user authentication for CI/CD pipelines
narrative.impact: Automated deployments can now authenticate using platform machine users instead of personal credentials
details: New login --machineuser flag authenticates with client ID and secret for non-interactive environments
Supports --client-id and --client-secret options or TAILOR_PLATFORM_MACHINE_USER_CLIENT_ID/CLIENT_SECRET environment variables
Client secret is prompted securely when omitted, preventing credential leaks in shell history
Token is stored in platform config for automatic use by subsequent SDK commands

entries.title: Entrypoint option eliminates circular dependency errors
entries.body:
New entrypoint option in appShellRoutes() plugin limits module interception to a single file

Eliminates circular module dependencies that previously caused TDZ errors at runtime

Recommended to set entrypoint: 'src/App.tsx' in your vite.config for safer builds

Only imports from the entrypoint file are replaced with pages-injected AppShell
entries.bodyHtml:
• New entrypoint option in appShellRoutes() plugin limits module interception to a single file
  • Eliminates circular module dependencies that previously caused TDZ errors at runtime
  • Recommended to set entrypoint: 'src/App.tsx' in your vite.config for safer builds
  • Only imports from the entrypoint file are replaced with pages-injected AppShell

narrative.summary: Entrypoint option eliminates circular dependency errors
narrative.impact: Prevents temporal dead zone errors caused by circular imports in page components
details: New entrypoint option in appShellRoutes() plugin limits module interception to a single file
Eliminates circular module dependencies that previously caused TDZ errors at runtime
Recommended to set entrypoint: 'src/App.tsx' in your vite.config for safer builds
Only imports from the entrypoint file are replaced with pages-injected AppShell
narrative.migration: Add entrypoint option to appShellRoutes() in your vite.config.ts to avoid potential circular import issues.

entries.title: Federation composition engine in shadow mode
entries.body:
New federation composition engine runs in shadow mode alongside existing implementation

Enables safe validation of federation changes before switching over

OTel collector sidecar resources increased for gateway-d to handle additional telemetry

Shadow mode lets platform team compare composition results without affecting production traffic
entries.bodyHtml:
• New federation composition engine runs in shadow mode alongside existing implementation
  • Enables safe validation of federation changes before switching over
  • OTel collector sidecar resources increased for gateway-d to handle additional telemetry
  • Shadow mode lets platform team compare composition results without affecting production traffic

narrative.summary: Federation composition engine in shadow mode
narrative.impact: Next-generation GraphQL federation engine running in parallel for safe testing
details: New federation composition engine runs in shadow mode alongside existing implementation
Enables safe validation of federation changes before switching over
OTel collector sidecar resources increased for gateway-d to handle additional telemetry
Shadow mode lets platform team compare composition results without affecting production traffic

entries.title: AuthConnection status monitoring and organization cleanup
entries.body:
AuthConnection objects now expose a status field for monitoring SSO configuration health

Deleted organizations are now fully purged across auth, PAM, and operator services

Prevents orphaned data and credential leaks from deleted organizations

Status field enables automated alerting on broken SSO integrations
entries.bodyHtml:
• AuthConnection objects now expose a status field for monitoring SSO configuration health
  • Deleted organizations are now fully purged across auth, PAM, and operator services
  • Prevents orphaned data and credential leaks from deleted organizations
  • Status field enables automated alerting on broken SSO integrations

narrative.summary: AuthConnection status monitoring and organization cleanup
narrative.impact: Monitor SSO connection health and ensure deleted organizations are fully purged
details: AuthConnection objects now expose a status field for monitoring SSO configuration health
Deleted organizations are now fully purged across auth, PAM, and operator services
Prevents orphaned data and credential leaks from deleted organizations
Status field enables automated alerting on broken SSO integrations

entries.title: GraphQL alias support in TailorErrors paths
entries.body:
TailorErrors path field now includes GraphQL aliases when present in the original query

Makes it easier to correlate errors with the exact field in your query

Particularly helpful when querying the same field multiple times with different aliases

Works seamlessly with existing error handling code
entries.bodyHtml:
• TailorErrors path field now includes GraphQL aliases when present in the original query
  • Makes it easier to correlate errors with the exact field in your query
  • Particularly helpful when querying the same field multiple times with different aliases
  • Works seamlessly with existing error handling code

narrative.summary: GraphQL alias support in TailorErrors paths
narrative.impact: Error paths correctly reference GraphQL aliases used in queries
details: TailorErrors path field now includes GraphQL aliases when present in the original query
Makes it easier to correlate errors with the exact field in your query
Particularly helpful when querying the same field multiple times with different aliases
Works seamlessly with existing error handling code

entries.title: Human-in-the-loop workflows with wait/resolve API
entries.body:
New wait/resolve API enables workflows to request human intervention at any step

Workflows pause automatically and resume when a human provides input or approval

Useful for approval gates, manual data entry, or quality checks in automated processes

Workspace subset routing support added for better multi-tenant isolation
entries.bodyHtml:
• New wait/resolve API enables workflows to request human intervention at any step
  • Workflows pause automatically and resume when a human provides input or approval
  • Useful for approval gates, manual data entry, or quality checks in automated processes
  • Workspace subset routing support added for better multi-tenant isolation

narrative.impact: Workflows can now pause for human approval before continuing execution
details: New wait/resolve API enables workflows to request human intervention at any step
Workflows pause automatically and resume when a human provides input or approval
Useful for approval gates, manual data entry, or quality checks in automated processes
Workspace subset routing support added for better multi-tenant isolation
